'''√sh-d-ng''' ('''kashadang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:laik|laik]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-d-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:laik|laik]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √sh-d-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kashadang
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thishadang || jishadang || shishadang || kishadang
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthushadang || jujushadang || shushushadang || kukushadang
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thushadang || jushadang || shushadang || kushadang
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thushadang || jushadang || shushadang || kushadang
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || theshadang || jeshadang || sheshadang || keshadang
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothoshadang || jojoshadang || shoshoshadang || kokoshadang
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thoshadang || joshadang || shoshadang || koshadang
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thoshadang || joshadang || shoshadang || koshadang
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || shadang || shadang || shadang || shadang
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || shadang || shadang || shadang || shadang
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || shadang || shadang || shadang || shadang
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || shadang || shadang || shadang || shadang
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæshadang || jæshadang || shæshadang || kæshadang
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathashadang || jajashadang || shashashadang || kakashadang
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thashadang || jashadang || shashadang || kashadang
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thashadang || jashadang || shashadang || kashadang
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shashadang
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshashadang
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishashadang
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shashadangnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshashadangnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishashadangnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shashadangshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshashadangnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishashadangshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shashadangro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshashadangnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishashadangro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shashadangmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshashadangnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishashadangmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shashadangsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshashadangnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishashadangsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shashadangng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshashadangnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishashadangng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shashadangya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshashadangnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishashadangya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shashadangyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshashadangnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishashadangyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shashadangnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshashadangnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishashadangnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shashadangnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshashadangnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishashadangnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shashadangnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshashadangnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishashadangnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shashadangshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshashadangnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishashadangshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shashadangshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshashadangnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishashadangshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shashadangshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshashadangnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishashadangshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shashadangronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshashadangnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishashadangronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shashadangroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshashadangnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishashadangroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shashadangromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshashadangnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishashadangromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shashadangmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshashadangnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishashadangmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shashadangmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshashadangnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishashadangmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shashadangmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshashadangnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishashadangmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
